## Summary

<!-- Explain what changed and why. Link the issue with "Closes #..." when appropriate. -->

## Target branch

- [ ] Feature/fix PR targets `develop`.
- [ ] PR targets `main` only as a verified release promotion from `develop`.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behaviour.
- [ ] Relevant tests pass locally.
- [ ] Complete existing test suite passes.
- [ ] Feature was run successfully at least once.
- [ ] No placeholder statistics or unverified claims were introduced.

## Security review

- [ ] No credentials, wallet secrets, tokens, or populated environment files are included.
- [ ] Financial values use fixed-precision types.
- [ ] Failure paths remain fail closed.
- [ ] Logs and UI data do not expose sensitive metadata.
- [ ] Dependency and workflow changes are pinned and minimally permissioned.

## Release evidence

<!-- Required for develop -> main release PRs. -->

- Test evidence:
- Known limitations:
- Rollback plan:
